step_rationale: NAGLU is an oxidative stress-linked CAD causal target; mechanism in atherothrombosis unclear.
mechanism: NAGLU is a causal target for oxidative stress-linked CAD contributing to plaque inflammation and atherosclerotic progression.

references.title: Oxidative Stress-Related Genome-Wide Mendelian Randomization Identifies Causal Genes for Coronary Artery Disease.
